description: Instructional Assistant for a 250-student graduate course in Data Visualization (CSE 578), conducting weekly doubt sessions, assisting with assignments and providing support to students in understanding data visualization concepts and tools.

Lead Grader for a 340-student graduate course in Knowledge Representation and Reasoning (CSE 579), overseeing graders, preparing exams and assignments, and ensuring accurate, timely grading and communication.

Led a team to achieve 3rd place in the Summer Volunteer Internship Hackathon 2025 out of a total of 18 participating teams, developing an innovative drive management solution with a collaborative chat interface and agentic AI integration.
Designed the complete system architecture and technical workflow, including frontend, backend, AI, and database layers.
Implemented 80% of the codebase, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and high performance across the application.
Integrated advanced technologies including TypeScript, React, Python, LangChain, Google Gemini, and Supabase to deliver AI-driven functionalities and real-time collaboration features.
Engineered drive integration for seamless file management and designed a robust database schema for efficient data handling.
Organized and led weekly team meetings, assigning tasks, tracking progress, and ensuring alignment with project goals.
Established GitHub workflows with structured branching strategies, PR reviews, coding guidelines, and version control best practices.
Acted as a mentor and technical guide, helping teammates solve complex issues, optimize code, and adopt best development practices.
Mentored two undergraduate students on development of a Book Recommendation System project and Local Image Finder application
Provided technical guidance, code reviews, and architectural design support for student projects
Helped with the complete project lifecycle, from ideation to deployment

BookTrack - Mentored Jesus Aguilar in building an AI-powered book recommendation web app using Next.js and React. The app personalizes suggestions based on user-defined prompts and delivers a rich discovery experience with enhanced metadata and visual presentation.

Local Image Finder (LIF) - Guided Quy Hoang Nguyen in developing a privacy-first, cross-platform desktop image search application using Python, Flask and Electron.js. The app performs on-device semantic search using natural language or image queries to organize and retrieve local images efficiently.
Optimized Django ORM queries, improving data processing throughput by 65% and restoring SLA compliance for client ML workflows.
Crafted WCAG-accessible React/Redux/Node UI for a multi-tenant B2B dashboard with tenant-isolated views for 4 enterprises.
Architected async pipeline with Celery, RabbitMQ, Redis for high-volume batch jobs, cutting job runtime by 30%.
Deployed Docker microservices on GKE with Jenkins CI/CD; hardened all routes with OAuth, SSO, SAML and RBAC middleware; enforced OWASP controls, closing 70% of identified vulnerabilities.
Accelerated MongoDB reads by 40% with compound indexing and query projection; managed zero-downtime schema migrations.
Implemented WebSocket push delivery for real-time analytics, replacing polling with sub-second updates.
Designed partitioned BigQuery tables for analytics pipelines, reducing query scan costs by 25%.
Provisioned Azure Blob Storage, ADLS data lake and Data Factory orchestration, migrating 50GB+ of data.
Streamlined Azure DevOps CI/CD with cached dependency layers, cutting deploy time by 40%.
Authored pipeline architecture docs, shrinking new engineer ramp-up from 2 weeks to 3 days.
Refactored 20+ ad-hoc Jupyter notebooks into modular, testable Python pipelines.
Profiled Azure Data Factory execution and tuned parallelism settings, reducing pipeline runtimes by 35%.
Developed Spring Boot REST APIs with JPA/Hibernate; enforced JWT and RBAC across 20+ protected routes.
Spearheaded Streamflux's custom Python ML deployment feature - built sandboxed execution environment enabling 30+ multi-tenant client configurations, landing 1 new enterprise client.
Engineered Hadoop and Apache Spark pipelines on AWS EMR; tuned S3/Redis caching, cutting pipeline runtime by 27%.
Raised backend test coverage from 34% to 81% with JUnit, catching 12 regressions before production.
Instrumented drift detection and PDP visualization for ML monitoring, cutting undetected drift incidents by 45%.
Diagnosed JVM and Python executor memory pressure on AWS EMR, reducing Spark OOM failures by 60%.

Collaborated with Prof. Mayank Goswami to develop a Python-based program to perform 3D reconstruction of small objects from CT scan data using the MART (Multiplicative Algebraic Reconstruction Technique) algorithm.
Utilized NumPy for numerical computation and OpenCV for image processing tasks.
Focused on improving reconstruction accuracy and computational efficiency through algorithmic optimization.
Conducted a lecture for Ph.D. scholars on algorithms used in numerical analysis.
Led the development of an interactive Pong game combining Unity and Python (cv2) for real-time hand gesture detection.
Engineered a 3D holographic display using an inverted acrylic truncated square prism placed over an LED screen, simulating a floating hologram effect.
Coordinated team efforts across game design, computer vision integration and physical setup to deliver a fully functional and immersive system.
